prompt: App icon design for 'Clawsses', an AR glasses app. The icon shows two stylized crab claws (pincers) that curve towards each other to form the outline shape of eyeglasses. The left claw forms the left lens frame, the right claw forms the right lens frame. They connect at a small bridge point in the center (like a nose bridge on spectacles). The claws are sleek, geometric, and slightly tapered - not cartoonish, more like elegant vector art. Color: bright neon green (#00FF41, terminal/matrix green) with a subtle phosphor glow effect on pure black background. The style should evoke a retro CRT monitor or fighter jet HUD. No text, no extra elements. Square composition. Minimal, clean, iconic, suitable as a mobile app icon.
